items.source_name: World Gold Council 月度报告
items.event_summary: 国际金价 5 月上旬突破每盎司 2680 美元，月内涨幅约 6%，机构归因于避险需求与美元走弱。
items.raw_excerpt: Gold breached USD 2,680/oz in early May, up ~6% MoM, driven by safe-haven demand and a softer dollar; analysts split on whether the rally is structural.

items.event_summary: Pandora 宣布未来 6 个月在东南亚新增 12 家门店，其中新加坡 3 家，集中在中端商场，主打 K金与银饰轻奢线。
items.raw_excerpt: Pandora to add 12 SEA stores in six months, three in Singapore, located in mid-tier malls, focused on its affordable K-gold and silver collections.

items.event_summary: 新加坡 TikTok 上 #pearlcore 话题播放量月内增长约 3 倍，年轻用户把珍珠饰品当日常通勤与毕业季配饰讨论，晒单客单价偏低。
items.raw_excerpt: #pearlcore views in SG tripled this month; Gen-Z creators frame pearls as everyday and graduation-season wear, most hauls under SGD 120.

items.source_name: 新加坡广告标准管理局（ASAS）
items.event_summary: 新加坡 ASAS 发布贵金属广告新指引，要求珠宝广告不得使用'保值''升值''稳赚'等投资性宣称，除非附合规风险提示，2026-07-01 起执行。
items.raw_excerpt: ASAS new guideline bars jewelry ads from investment-style claims such as 'value-protected' or 'guaranteed return' without a compliant risk disclosure; effective 1 Jul 2026.

items.event_summary: Lazada 新加坡站调整珠宝类目促销规则，6 月大促把流量位向'轻奢设计款'与'低克重金饰'倾斜，高克重投资金条退出主推位。
items.raw_excerpt: Lazada SG reshapes June jewelry campaign: traffic slots tilt toward design-led affordable pieces and low-gram gold; high-gram gold bars dropped from hero placement.
